ItacPersonItem.Notes: His name as member of the Accademia della Fama is in Christina Roaf, `Introduzione`, in Francesco Sansovino, Lettere sopra le diece giornate del Decamerone di M. Giovanni Boccaccio, ed. C. Roaf, Bologna (2003),pp. XVI. More details about his life and network are at p. 116. Apparently he worked for the printer Marcolini and was a friend of Pietro Aretino.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
